source.name: Lab 3.1: mcp_servers block for endpoints.yml (fill-in-the-blanks)
source.instructions: **Fill in the blanks** for the **`mcp_servers`** entry. **After you pass:** merge this block into **`level6/endpoints.yml`** — add it after **`tools:`** (and before **`model_groups:`**), without removing **`action_endpoint`**, **`nlg`**, **`tools`**, or **`model_groups`**. Then run the **Code Test** (the next assessment).
source.guidance: **`name`** must match **`connections.mcp_servers`** in **`sub_agents/banking_assistant/config.yml`**. **`url`** is the Streamable HTTP endpoint for this repo’s FastMCP server (**`/mcp`** path). **`type`** is **`http`**. **After you pass,** merge into **`level6/endpoints.yml`**, save, then run the **Code Test**.
